description: Auto-print shipping labels when order is packed: create Tiny shipment group, fetch label URL, send to PrintNode, track etiqueta_status, enable reprint

userStories.title: Tiny API functions for shipment group and label URLs
userStories.description: As the system, I need to create shipment groups and fetch label URLs from Tiny's expedition API to obtain the shipping label for printing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add async function criarAgrupamento(token: string, idsPedidos: number[]): Promise<{ id: number }> to src/lib/tiny-api.ts
criarAgrupamento calls POST /expedicao with body { idsPedidos } and returns the agrupamento id
Add async function obterEtiquetasAgrupamento(token: string, idAgrupamento: number): Promise<{ urls: string[] }> to src/lib/tiny-api.ts
obterEtiquetasAgrupamento calls GET /expedicao/{idAgrupamento}/etiquetas and returns the urls array
Both functions use existing tinyFetch helper with rate limiting and retry logic
Add TypeScript interfaces for the response types
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Etiqueta service (buscarEImprimirEtiqueta)
userStories.description: As the system, I need a service that fetches the shipping label from Tiny and sends it to PrintNode on the correct printer.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/etiqueta-service.ts
Export async function buscarEImprimirEtiqueta(pedidoId: string): Promise<void>
Step 1: fetch pedido from DB with empresa_origem_id, agrupamento_tiny_id, etiqueta_url, etiqueta_status
Step 2: if etiqueta_status = 'impresso', return early (idempotent)
Step 3: resolve label URL — if etiqueta_url exists use it; else if agrupamento_tiny_id exists call obterEtiquetasAgrupamento; else call criarAgrupamento then obterEtiquetasAgrupamento
Step 4: save agrupamento_tiny_id and etiqueta_url (urls[0]) to siso_pedidos
Step 5: update etiqueta_status = 'imprimindo'
Step 6: resolve printer via resolverImpressora(separado_por or operator, separacao_galpao_id) from printnode.ts
Step 7: call enviarImpressao from printnode.ts with the resolved printer and PDF URL
Step 8: update etiqueta_status = 'impresso' on success, 'falhou' on any error
Use token from empresa de origem (getValidTokenByEmpresa) for Tiny API calls
If no printer configured, set etiqueta_status = 'falhou' and log warning
Never expose etiqueta_url to frontend responses (LGPD)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Trigger auto-print on pedido_completo in bipar endpoint
userStories.description: As the system, I need the bip endpoint to fire-and-forget the label printing when all items are scanned.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/api/separacao/bipar/route.ts, after returning 200 for pedido_completo status, call buscarEImprimirEtiqueta(pedidoId) as fire-and-forget
The auto-print must NOT block the 200 response to the client
Wrap in .catch() that logs error via logger but does not throw
If buscarEImprimirEtiqueta fails, etiqueta_status remains 'pendente' or becomes 'falhou' — operator can retry via reprint
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Reprint endpoint POST /api/separacao/reimprimir
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to reprint a shipping label for an already-packed order when the first print failed or I need another copy.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/reimprimir/route.ts with POST handler
Validate session via getSessionUser(request) — return 401 if invalid
Accept body { pedido_id: string }
Validate pedido belongs to operator's galpão — return 403 if not
Validate pedido has status_separacao = 'embalado' or 'expedido' — return 400 otherwise
If pedido has etiqueta_url, attempt to print directly via enviarImpressao
If print fails (URL expired), refetch via obterEtiquetasAgrupamento using stored agrupamento_tiny_id, update etiqueta_url, retry print
If no agrupamento_tiny_id exists, call full flow via buscarEImprimirEtiqueta
Update etiqueta_status to 'impresso' on success, 'falhou' on error
Return { status: 'impresso', jobId } on success or { status: 'falhou', error } on failure
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enable reprint button and etiqueta_status badges in frontend
userStories.description: As an operator, I need the reprint button to work and see live label status badges in the Embalados tab.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/components/separacao/tab-embalados.tsx, enable the 'Reimprimir Etiqueta' button (remove disabled state and placeholder tooltip from PRD 5)
Button calls POST /api/separacao/reimprimir with { pedido_id } using sisoFetch
Show toast on success: 'Etiqueta reimpressa' and on failure: 'Falha ao reimprimir etiqueta'
Add 'Tentar Novamente' button visible only when etiqueta_status = 'falhou', calls same reprint endpoint
etiqueta_status badge colors: pendente → yellow/amber, imprimindo → blue, impresso → green, falhou → red
Badge updates on polling refetch (already 10s interval from PRD 5)
Typecheck passes
